message:
feat(telemetry): extend hostcall telemetry schema with lane routing and marshalling fields

Schema (runtime_hostcall_telemetry.json):
- Add required fields: lane, lane_decision_reason, lane_matrix_key,
  lane_dispatch_latency_ms, lane_latency_share_bps for dispatch lane
  routing observability
- Add required fields: marshalling_path, marshalling_latency_us,
  marshalling_fallback_count, marshalling_superinstruction_expected_cost_delta,
  marshalling_superinstruction_observed_cost_delta for marshalling path
  telemetry
- Add optional fields: lane_fallback_reason, marshalling_fallback_reason,
  marshalling_superinstruction_trace_signature, marshalling_superinstruction_plan_id,
  marshalling_superinstruction_deopt_reason
- lane enum: fast | compat | unknown
- lane_latency_share_bps capped at 10000 (basis points)

E2E telemetry test:
- Validate lane value is one of fast/compat/unknown for every event
- Assert lane_matrix_key and marshalling_path are non-empty
- Assert lane_latency_share_bps ≤ 10000
- Validate superinstruction trace_signature/plan_id/deopt_reason are
  non-blank when present, and plan_id requires trace_signature
- Log all new fields in structured telemetry context

QA docs policy validation:
- Add runtime_hostcall_telemetry_schema_is_versioned test verifying
  both artifact and event schema IDs match canonical version string
- Add runtime_hostcall_telemetry_schema_requires_lane_and_marshalling_fields
  test asserting all 10 required lane/marshalling fields are present

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
